description: Extend your cozy living area by adding a covered porch to your Uchi or Tsuku tent. The Base Camp Awning is a designed to match the Uchi Tent or Tsuku Base Tent doors with a V shaped side that allows complete coverage where the awning and tent meet. The Base Camp Awning is a component of the Case Camp Bundle. Made from DOD's revolutionary Canvo ™ fabric. Poles included. Expands living space of the Uchi Tent & Tsuku Base Tent. Includes three poles. Crafted from durable Canvo ™ fabric. V-shaped design matches seamlessly to the Uchi or Tsuku. Also works as an independent tarp shelter. Canvo™ provides a vastly superior camping experience, compared to the polyester used to make most modern tents. The material breathes, so it does not become humid. It’s quieter in the wind, so you get a better night's sleep. It feels more natural than polyester and it’s more durable. You can learn more about care and maintenance of your Canvo™ tent or tarp here . You can learn more about Canvo™, the revolutionary new tent and tarp material, here .

description: The Chimaki Tent is designed for those who like a bit of style in camp. If Ray and Charles Eames went camping, this would be their tent. The Chimaki is a two walled tent, a thick Canvo ™ outer tent protects and thinner Canvo ™ inner tent with a large mesh or Canvo ™ door. The tent sleep two. It’s enough to standup straight inside. Unlike other one pole tent designs, the pole is on the outside of the tent so it doesn’t get in the way. The Chimaki can be used alone or as a component in the stunning Chimaki Village three room shelter. Versatile design for group or solo/duo camping. Easily hangs from a tarp or stands alone with included pole. Durable and spark-resistant polycotton fabric. Breathable with mesh door and window. Compact and convenient. The Kama is made of durable Canvo ™ fabric which which is stronger than polyester and casts deep, cool shadows, great for summer camping. Canvo, unlike polyester, won't melt if it catches a campfire spark. The square shape with many attachment points allow for versatile setups. (For a limited time, comes with pegs, set of two standard poles, and one extra tall pole to lift the center of the tarp). Canvo ™ fabric for deep shade and longer life. Many grommets and loops for varied setups. Reinforced center for added setup options. Pairs well with large tents or can be used alone. description: Introducing the Kamaboko Super Tent. A Super Tent is a large camp shelter under which you can pitch several smaller tents or set up cots. The Kamaboko comes with an sleeping chamber that sleeps 7 adults, that attaches to the ribs and can easily be removed when not in use. Inside the Kamaboko, smaller tents can go up with no rainfly so your small tent does not get muggy and sticky. During the day, pull the tents outside and use the shelter as a bug tent or sun/rain tarp. There’s no floor in the tent so it can easily be erected over a picnic table to create a comfortable campsite dining room. Super Tent – pitch smaller tents inside, or use as a bug tent, sun/rain tarp. High ceilings and wide span provide lots of unobstructed space. Goes up fast, packs up small and light. End and side doors double as awnings; awning poles not included. No floor so you can walk in and out without removing shoes or tracking in dirt. Front, back, and side panels zip up to expose mesh panels for increased airflow. Colors: Tan Olive Capacity: Sleeps 7 adults per sleeping chamber (one provided). Total capacity with 2 sleeping chambers is 14 adults. description: DOD Outdoors’ multi-functional super tent, the Kamaboko, is the centerpiece of the perfect base camp. Comfort in camp requires more than just a place to sleep. You also need a place to get out of the sun, out of the rain, away from the bugs, or just get some privacy. The Kamaboko offers all that. A range of accessories sold separately let you customize the tent to exactly meet your needs. The Kamaboko comes with a sleeping chamber that attaches to the ribs and can easily be removed when not in use. Super Tent – pitch smaller tents inside, or use as a bug tent, sun/rain tarp. Comes with one hanging sleeping chamber that sleeps 5 adults. An additional optional sleeping chamber (sold separately) can be hung on opposite side to double sleeping capacity to 10 adults. High ceilings and wide span provide lots of unobstructed space. Goes up fast, packs up small and light. End doors double as awnings; awning poles not included. No floor so you can walk in and out without removing shoes or tracking in dirt. Front, back, and side panels zip up to expose mesh panels for increased airflow. Colors: Tan Capacity: Fits 5 adults per inner tent (one included). Total capacity with 2 inner tents is 10 adults. Dimensions/footprint: Please refer to picture diagram for full dimensions. description: The Moto 1Pull Tent is a small footprint two-room tent. The design is perfect for campers who appreciate the advantages of separate rooms in the same tent, but still need a smaller tent. It's inspired by motorcycle touring tents, but works great for any type of camping. DOD's 1Pull system allows quick setup and take down. The inner chamber is mesh-enclosed for sleeping. The outer chamber, or vestibule, is a place to hang out away from sun, rain, or bugs. In the evening, it's a safe space to park a bicycle, motorcycle, or gear. Two-room structure provides distinct spaces. Compact and lightweight, making it easy to transport on any adventure. Large vestibule area, perfect for storing equipment or enjoying the view. DOD's one-pull system allows for quick setup and take down. Durable construction ensuring reliable shelter in various weather conditions. description: Turn your RX Tent, Takenoko Bell Tent, Ichi One Pole Tent, or Tsuku Base Tent into a dining room or game room with the One Pole Tent Table. The round table fits around the center pole. At 3ft (90cm) across, it offers plenty of space. The table is free-standing - the two halves link together with magnets - so it’s easy to move outside the tent when it’s time to sleep or when you need a table anywhere else in camp. You can even stack the two halves to create a shelf system in your camp kitchen. Compatible with the RX, Ichi, Tsuku Base, and Takenoko Bell Tents. Fast and easy setup can be done in minutes. 3ft (90cm) diameter is all the space you need. Designed to fit around the center pole of the Ichi One Pole tent. description: Other camping chairs have one seating position: low or high, reclined or straight up. And whichever chair you bring along on your trip, that’s how you’ll sit for the whole trip. The Sugoi Chair solves that problem by adjusting to all seating positions. Whether enjoying a meal with your family around the table or roasting marshmallows around the campfire, the height and angle of our Sugoi Chair adjusts to suit the occasion. Sit in comfort - Whether enjoying a meal with your family around the table or roasting marshmallows around the campfire. The height and angle of our Sugoi Chair adjusts to suit the occasion. Adjust the height - Adjust to 4 different heights, from ground level to within inches of your morning coffee on the camp table. Adjust the seating angle - Raise or lower the front or rear legs to sit forward or lean back. Temperature controlled - The cotton canvas seat is cool when the weather’s warm, warm when the weather’s cool. Unlike chairs made with synthetic fabrics, the cotton canvas seat wicks moisture and breaths. Easy to assemble - Simple to set up and break down. Spark resistant - Made of cotton, the Sugoi Chair won’t melt when it gets hit with a spark from the campfire (not fireproof). Light and easy to carry - Carry bag included. The Sugoi Chair packs up flat for easy travel and storage. description: The Takenoko Bell Tent lets you create a glamping experience anywhere you go. The perfect tent for a group to relax, dine, and sleep, all under one versatile roof. Glorious Canvo ™ roof allows the tent to breathe so it never gets muggy. All walls convert to mesh or wide open to let in the breeze. The included floor can be taken out to make the tent useful all day, drag a picnic table undercover and don’t worry about muddy boots when you have the floor removed. Install the sleeping chamber (sold separately) to divide the space into two separate rooms for privacy. Approximately 150 square feet of luxurious interior space ensures comfort and freedom of movement. Canvo ™ roof creates a deep shadow and reduces condensation and polyester walls make this tent lightweight. description: THE 1Pull Dome Tent combines ease of setup with spacious comfort, accommodating up to 3 people. Its 1Pull mechanism allows for hassle-free assembly. DOD’s muted color palette adds a touch of elegance to your camping experience. The tent includes a front chamber for additional space, making it perfect for both relaxation and storage. Large footprint awning extends living area and provides shade. (For a limited time, comes with Kiso Tarp Poles for awning). Effortless 1Pull setup for quick and convenient assembly. Spacious interior with a high ceiling and large front room comfortably fits 3 people. Large doors and windows provide cool ventilation in summer. Ground sheet included for added floor protection and durability. Colors: Tan/Olive Sleeping Capacity: 3 people Dimensions W x D x H: 87 in x 177 in x 71 in (220 cm x 450 cm x 180 cm) Inner size: W x D x H: 85 in x 85 in x 65 in (215 cm x 215 cm x 165 cm) Packed size W x D x H: 30 in x 9 in x 9 in (75 cm x 22 cm x 22 cm) Weight: 19 lbs (8.4 kg) Materials : Outer shell: 150D polyester (PU coating) Frame: Aluminum alloy, steel Inner tent floor: 210D polyester (PU coating)
highlights: Effortless 1Pull setup for quick and convenient assembly.
Spacious interior with a high ceiling and large front room comfortably fits 3 people.
Large doors and windows provide cool ventilation in summer.
Ground sheet included for added floor protection and durability.

description: THE Dome Tent epitomizes classic tent design with its orthodox dome shape and crossed poles. Its simplicity makes for easy setup, and the added front room offers a relaxing space. This tent comes with a ground sheet to protect it and is made with durable 150D fabric. It features ample space, with a high ceiling in the inner tent and a large front room that can be extended into a canopy area for additional living space. (For a limited time, comes with Kiso Tarp Poles for awning). Classic dome design with easy-to-assemble cross-frame structure. Spacious interior suitable for up to 3 people. Large doors and windows ensure cool summers and warm springs/autumns. Includes a ground sheet for floor protection and easy setup. Made with durable 150D fabric for light blocking and longevity. Colors: Tan/Olive Dimensions: Medium: W x D x H: 87 in x 171 in x 71 in (220 cm x 435 cm x 180 cm) Inner size: W x D x H: 85 in x 85 in x 79 in (215 cm x 215 cm x 175 cm) Packed size W x D x H: 25 in x 9 in x 9 in (63 cm x 22 cm x 22 cm) Weight: 20 lbs (8.9 kg) Materials Outer shell: 150D polyester (PU coating) Frame: Aluminum alloy Inner tent floor: 210D polyester (PU coating)
highlights: Classic dome design with easy-to-assemble cross-frame structure.
Spacious interior suitable for up to 3 people.
Large doors and windows ensure cool summers and warm springs/autumns.
Includes a ground sheet for floor protection and easy setup.

description: The Tomo 1Pull Dome Tent's one-pull setup allows for instant assembly, making it a convenient option for those who want to quickly set up camp and relax. This tent has a sleeping chamber and a front chamber to put your shoes or other items. Its compact design when packed makes it suitable for various travel modes, including motorcycle touring. One-pull system makes for a quick and easy setup with the pull of a string. Distinct sleeping chamber and front chamber for storage. Compact and lightweight, making it easy to transport on any adventure. Durable construction ensuring reliable shelter in various weather conditions. Color: Gray Dimensions W x D x H: External Size: 7.12 ft x 7.9 ft x 4.4 ft ( 243 cm x 235 cm x 133cm) Inner Size: 7.5 ft x 4.9 ft x 3.7 ft (225 cm x 145 cm x 110cm) Storage Size: 24 in x 8 in x 8 in ( 62 cm x 20 cm x 20cm) Weight: 9.47 Ibs (4.3 kg) Capacity: 2 adults Materials : Outer tent: 70D nylon (PU coating, ripstop processing) Inner tent: Braceable fabric Floor fabric/ground sheet: 150D polyester (PU coating) Tent pole: Aluminum alloy
highlights: One-pull system makes for a quick and easy setup with the pull of a string.
Distinct sleeping chamber and front chamber for storage.
Compact and lightweight, making it easy to transport on any adventure.
Durable construction ensuring reliable shelter in various weather conditions.

description: Introducing the Uchi Tent, where classic wall tent design merges with modern functionality to deliver a unique camping experience. Crafted from breathable Canvo ™ fabric, this tent offers an inviting space that remains cool in summer and warm in winter. The large mesh windows ensure optimal ventilation, adapting to diverse weather conditions. The near-vertical walls enhance the feeling of spaciousness within, making every moment inside the tent a comfortable one. Plus, expand your living space seamlessly with the attachable Base Camp Awning, sold separately. ( Restock Fall 2026) House-shaped silhouette offers a unique yet familiar visual appeal. Uses breathable Canvo ™ for the roof to minimize condensation, paired with polyester walls for a balance of durability and lightness. Designed for all seasons with large mesh windows allowing complete ventilation in summer and the option to fully enclose in winter. Nearly vertical walls allow you to not feel constricted. Equipped with dual doors at the front and the back for easy access. Features an adjustable top ventilator for optimal air circulation. highlights: House-shaped silhouette offers a unique yet familiar visual appeal.
Uses breathable Canvo ™ for the roof to minimize condensation, paired with polyester walls for a balance of durability and lightness.
Designed for all seasons with large mesh windows allowing complete ventilation in summer and the option to fully enclose in winter.
Nearly vertical walls allow you to not feel constricted.

description: Discover the Wagaya 1Pull Tent, a breathable and stylish tent perfect for your outdoor escapades. It features a polycotton inner tent that maintains a comfortable atmosphere, warding off humidity and condensation. This material helps retain heat in cold conditions and, with mesh panels, ensures a cool breeze in warm weather. Boasting a 35 sq ft inner space plus a 15 sq ft enclosed awning, The Wagaya 1Pull Tent offers ample room for gear storage. DOD's effortless 1Pull setup and chic, muted color palette add a touch of Japanese elegance to your camping experience. DOD's 1Pull system allows quick setup and take down. Breathable polycotton inner tent. Clean lines and muted color. Colors: Tan Sleeping capacity: 2 adults Dimensions Assembled Size: W x D x H: 94 in x 94 in x 47 in (240 cm x 240 cm x 120cm) Inner Size: W x D x H: 89 in x 57 in x 41 in (225 cm x 145 cm x 103 cm) Packed size: W x D x H: 28 in x 9 in x 8 in ( 71 cm x 22 cm x 21 cm) Weight: 14 lbs (6.5 kg) Materials Outer shell: 150D polyester (PU coating, UV protection) Inner tent (sides): Polycotton (65% polyester, 35% cotton) Inner tent (floor): 210D polyester (PU coating) Ground sheet: 210D polyester (PU coating) ) Frame: Aluminum alloy Peg: Steel Canvo™ is DOD's revolutionary new tent fabric designed to maximize comfort in camp. Canvo™ provides a vastly superior camping experience, compared to the polyester used to make most modern tents. The material breathes, so it does not become humid. It’s quieter in the wind,
highlights: DOD's 1Pull system allows quick setup and take down.
Breathable polycotton inner tent.
Clean lines and muted color.

description: When you just need to get outside with a good book, you need the Yutori Chair. It’s comfortable enough to sit in for hours. The super cozy cushion cover is made from washable, breathable 100% cotton. When the weather is warm, just remove the cushion to convert to a mesh chair. Solid wood arms are pleasant to the touch and wide enough to hold a beverage. Great for the backyard, the kids’ ball game, and camping. Washable, breathable cushion. Converts to mesh chair when the weather warms up. Extra wide solid wood armrests. Color: Black, Tan Dimensions L x W x H: 28.7 in x 26.0 in x 32.3 in (73 cm x 66 cm x 82 cm) Packed size L x W x H: 35 in x 6.3 in x 30.7 in (89 cm x 16 cm x 78 cm) Weight: 12.1 lbs (5.5 kg) (including accessories) Materials Frame: Aluminum alloy Reinforcing frame: Steel Fabric: 600D polyester, polyester reinforced mesh (PVC Coating) Armrest: Wood Load capacity: 220 lbs (100 kg)
highlights: Great for the backyard, the kids’ ball game, and camping.
Washable, breathable cushion.
Converts to mesh chair when the weather warms up.
Extra wide solid wood armrests.
